title: gladiolus geardii
intro: Gladiolus geardii, commonly known as the sword lily or gladiolus, is a perennial plant species native to South Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Gladiolus geardii include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant activity. Herbal preparations of the plant typically involve drying and grinding the corms, which can be made into teas, infusions, or capsules for medicinal use.
